description: CompositionBlue jeggings made of 74% cotton, 23% polyester and 3% spandex, waist elasticated at the back and two back pockets with embroideryFittingRegularWash careMachine or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleach or wringUse mild detergent onlyDry in shadeMedium ironWith the look of jeans and style of leggings, these jeggings from jealous 21 are a great addition to any woman's wardrobe.
